# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv preprint with clear empirical substance: it studies five multi-agent frameworks across more than 150 tasks, uses six expert annotators, reports inter-annotator agreement metrics, introduces a failure taxonomy grounded in observed traces, and validates an automated judging pipeline. This is not generic commentary or theorycrafting; it reports concrete evaluation and analysis results.

## Limits
